name: Absorb LMS
description: Monitor user access, admin roles, and employee enrollment in Absorb Learning Management System

credentialFields.label: Portal URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Absorb LMS portal URL, e.g. yourcompany.myabsorb.com (no https:// prefix)

credentialFields.label: API Private Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your unique API Private Key (GUID). Request from Absorb Support or your System Admin.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users/learners in Absorb LMS to verify active employee access and account status

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Checks administrative roles and permissions in Absorb LMS to ensure proper role-based access control
